title: Limpet Usage by Type
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS launches FROM LaunchDrone WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Type AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM LaunchDrone WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Type ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {launches} limpet(s) launched during the report period. Collector limpets do the heavy lifting while prospector limpets do the intelligence work — the breakdown shows the operational mix of your mining workflow and how fast you burn through consumables.
details.help: LaunchDrone Type values include 'Collection', 'Prospector', 'FuelTransfer', and others. launches is the total count. (In-game, these are called limpets.)

tagLines: Limpet deployment telemetry compiled. Consumable expenditure rates noted in the mining operations log.
Limpets do the work you can't do while scanning the next rock. Mostly.
Collector limpets are the unsung crew of every mining run. They never complain about the shifts.
